allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('latest:', d['info']['version']\); print\('all:', sorted\(d['releases'].keys\(\)\)[-10:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('latest:', d['info']['version']\); print\('summary:', d['info']['summary']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('requires_python:', d['info']['requires_python']\); print\('deps:', d['info']['requires_dist']\)")
